finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Starting MSRP about $42,250 before tax, destination, and dealer fees.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Mazda publishes the APR and term, but not a single national monthly payment example on the model page.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by lender structure and buyer credit.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Mazda publishes lease cash support, but the static model page did not expose one national CX-70 monthly lease payment example.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by dealer and lease structure.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Mazda's CX-70 page currently advertises 1.9% APR for 36 months, plus $2,000 customer cash and $2,000 lease cash on 2026 CX-70 models.
finance_snapshot.warranty: Mazda USA lists a 3-year/36,000-mile New-Vehicle Limited Warranty, 5-year/60,000-mile Powertrain Limited Warranty, and 24/7 roadside assistance tied to applicable warranty coverage.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Buyers who want a more premium-feeling two-row SUV and a visible national finance headline.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Mazda is one of the few OEMs in this set exposing a clear public APR and cash-support package on the model page.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: The original research set used a 2025 CX-70 spec deck, while Mazda's current retail page and offers are for 2026 CX-70 inventory.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Mazda USA pricing and offer text on March 25, 2026. The live consumer page is for 2026 CX-70 rather than a legacy 2025 retail page.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle. Canonical image refreshed on March 28, 2026 from a user-provided replacement image.
